title: Sequencing With Mixed Blockers
intendedTensionBeat: The lower rescue is urgent but the ice route looks slower than a cleaner upper route.
intendedReleaseBeat: Correctly using ice creates a satisfying route payoff before the larger-board challenge.
expectedPath: Open the lower puppy through ice first, then pivot to the upper target.
expectedFailMode: Player spends early actions on the tidier crate side and loses tempo.
designNotes: This should feel like successful practice, not an exam. Keep enough margin for recovery.
